name: Nervous System Signaling Process
description: Nervous System Signaling Process in Animals. This process represents a higher-level biological mechanism distinct from molecular/biochemical processes covered in GLMP.
mermaid:
graph TD
    A48[Neuron Stimulation] --> B48[Action Potential]
    B48 --> C48[Axon Propagation]
    C48 --> D48[Synaptic Terminal]
    D48 --> E48[Neurotransmitter Release]
    E48 --> F48[Receptor Binding]
    F48 --> G48[Post-Synaptic Response]
    G48 --> H48[Signal Transmission]
    
    style A48 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style B48 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style C48 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style D48 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style E48 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style F48 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style G48 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style H48 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

sources.title: Programming Framework: A Universal Process Visualization Methodology
sources.notes: Higher-level biological process visualization: Nervous System Signaling Process. Created using the Programming Framework methodology for organismal and ecological process analysis.

sources.title: From Molecules to Networks: An Overview of Brain Dynamics

notes: Higher-level biological process. GLMP covers biochemical/molecular processes; this database covers organismal/ecological processes.
